title: Section 30A
content: [30A. Bills rediscounting.--The National Bank may rediscount bills of exchange and promissory notes made, drawn, accepted or endorsed by any company or body corporate concerned with agriculture and rural development presented by a scheduled bank, a State co-operative bank, State land development bank, regional rural bank or any other institution or class of institutions approved by the Board.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 17, ibid., for section 30 (w.e.f. 1-2-2001).
